metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for enterprise tool integrations — Red Hat support cases, Jira task tracking, and Slack messaging

plugins.name: rh-case
plugins.description: Red Hat support case management — list, show, search, analyze, and comment on cases via the Customer Portal API

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Jira integration — pick tickets, track time, post work logs, and update status without leaving your terminal

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Read and search Slack messages — search conversations, read channels, follow threads from your terminal
